summary: Executable local-runtime fixture proving unhydrated customer payment-method reads do not auto-seed sentinel fixture records under real customer IDs.

evidence.source: Rust local-runtime recorder using public Admin GraphQL requests
notes: Live customer payment-method success captures remain blocked by missing read_customer_payment_methods/write_customer_payment_methods scopes.
This local-runtime scenario protects the anti-seeding contract: a blank snapshot proxy must return null/empty data rather than fabricating base-card records for Customer/8801.
